$comment: Method registry — analyzer picks ONE method.id per scene from `methods` list. `wipMethods` are catalog'd but their renderer isn't built yet — DO NOT pick. Reliability: S=skill-backed, A=third-party skill, B=no skill.

engineGuidance.$comment: HyperFrames↔Remotion 决策矩阵。每个 method 已声明自己的 engine;这张表帮分析器按内容『语法』先想清该用哪种引擎的方法,再从该引擎的 method 里挑。不是硬规则,是倾向。

hyperframes.grammar: HTML / CSS / GSAP —— 排版、文字动效、卡片版面的天然介质
preferWhen: 标题 / 强调词 / 动感字体(kinetic typography)、短 hero/hook
纯文字字幕、简单出现-淡入(hf-css-fade 是万能兜底)
产品卡 / 发布反白标题卡 / 逗号分隔的名词列表铺陈
克制的 CSS 过场与版面网格(贴合印刷工坊设计思维)

remotion.grammar: React + useCurrentFrame —— 数据可视化与需要精确逐帧编排的复杂组件
preferWhen: 数据图表:3–10 个数值的柱/线/表(d3 精确、逐帧可控)
需要精确逐帧编排的复杂组件、卡片堆叠动画

engineGuidance.note: 两引擎都遵守印刷工坊审美(禁渐变/发光/AI 金光)。同等契合时优先 reliability=S 且更轻的 HyperFrames;只有数据图表/复杂逐帧编排才值得上 Remotion(渲染更重、每镜要 npm install)。

methods.label: GSAP Kinetic Text
methods.whenToUse: Short title, hero phrase, emphasis word, or kinetic typography. Best for 1–8 word lines.

methods.label: Plain CSS Fade Caption
methods.whenToUse: Universal fallback. Use when no stronger method fits — text just needs to appear. Always safe.

methods.label: Anime.js Word Scatter Reveal
methods.whenToUse: Lists of 3–7 items, comma-delimited enumerations, or text where words should fly in one by one with stagger.

methods.label: WAAPI Highlight Marker Sweep
methods.whenToUse: When a single phrase or word inside a longer line needs to be highlighted with a marker sweep / underline / circle.

methods.label: D3 Bar Race (Remotion)
methods.whenToUse: Multi-subject ranking that changes over time (leaderboard / market-share race). Bars reorder with a 0.8s power2.inOut shift as values roll; the new #1染 accent, the displaced one falls to accent2. Needs scene.data.years (steps) + scene.data.series with a value per step. ≤8 bars. Prefer over rm-d3-bar-chart when the RANK CHANGE is the story.

methods.label: D3 Bar Chart (Remotion)
methods.whenToUse: Comparing 3–10 numerical values (rankings, scores, PPG, revenue per period). One categorical axis + one numerical axis.

methods.label: D3 Line Draw / Trend Scan (Remotion)
methods.whenToUse: Trend narration (growth / decline / change over time) where the curve should DRAW itself. stroke-dashoffset draws in ~1.5s with a cursor dot on the tip; turning points pop as the cursor reaches them; extra series dim to 35%. Needs scene.data.years + scene.data.series. Prefer over rm-d3-line-trend when the drawing motion carries the story.

methods.label: D3 Line / Trend Chart (Remotion)
methods.whenToUse: Showing change over time. Continuous data on a temporal x-axis.

methods.label: Framer Motion Card Stack (Remotion)
methods.whenToUse: When the line introduces 2–5 named things to compare (products, libraries, options). Each becomes a Framer Motion card that springs into place.

methods.label: Lottie Animation Play
methods.whenToUse: When a .lottie/.json animation asset exists and the line invites watching it (logo reveal, icon explanation, animated illustration).

methods.label: Image Ken Burns Pan/Zoom (Remotion)
methods.whenToUse: When the line narrates over a single image and wants a cinematic slow pan/zoom feel (Ken Burns).

methods.label: Raw Video Clip (Remotion passthrough)
methods.whenToUse: When the asset pool has a B-roll/clip whose duration matches the scene. Just plays it back with light grade.

methods.label: Tailwind Tile / Pricing-Card
methods.whenToUse: When the line introduces a single product/feature in a tile-style frame. Cheap and clean.

methods.label: Word Punch (金句 keyword hit)
methods.whenToUse: A punchline / conclusion / turning-point phrase that should HIT. An accent block sweeps in (scaleX), then the text lands (scale 1.3→1). scene.text = the line(s); newlines stack staggered punches. Keep lines short (金句, ≤18 CJK chars). Use sparingly — ≤2 per 15s or it reads cheap.

methods.label: Chapter Title Card
methods.whenToUse: Chapter/section divider card (小Lin说 dark/gold). scene.text='第六章|多米诺骨牌|Dominoes|97-99' (chapNo|titleCN|titleEN|years).

methods.label: Stat Counter (count-up)
methods.whenToUse: Big single-number / statistic callout with count-up animation. scene.text='300|%|香港隔夜拆借利率|1997.10' (value|suffix|label|sublabel; value may carry $/¥ prefix; non-numeric shown literally).

methods.label: Mega Counter (full-screen hero number)
methods.whenToUse: One core number owning the whole frame (score / price / percentage). Number rolls 0→N in 1.2s, the unit fades in late, and an optional up/down delta arrow pops last in ok/alert. scene.text='286|%|香港隔夜拆借利率|1997.10|+18%' (value|suffix|label|sublabel|delta; value may carry $/¥ prefix). Prefer over hf-stat-counter when the number IS the shot.

methods.label: Versus Panel (A vs B parameter table)
methods.whenToUse: A vs B (up to 3 columns) parameter pull-table. Sides slide in from opposite edges; rows light up one by one; the winning cell染 accent, the losing column dims. scene.text is newline-separated: line 1 = column titles 'AI Switch|竞品 X', then rows '月费|¥0*|¥99' (label|val per column; trailing * = row winner).

methods.label: Cinematic Poster Hero (image + hero text)
methods.whenToUse: Hero line narrated over a full-bleed generated/stock image — cinematic essay poster with kicker + subtitle chrome. Needs a background image; without one it falls back to kinetic-text.

methods.label: Scribble Annotate (hand-drawn arrows / circle)
methods.whenToUse: Relationships / flow / how something moves between parties (钱怎么流). Nodes connect with hand-drawn wobbly arrows that draw stroke-by-stroke; the emphasised (last) node gets a hand-drawn ring. scene.text is a flow: nodes split by → / -> / newline (e.g. '用户 → 网关 → 模型'). 2–4 nodes, ≤3 drawn strokes.

methods.label: Mountain Occlusion Title Reveal
methods.whenToUse: Special cinematic reveal: a title rises and is occluded by a foreground silhouette (mountains/skyline), emerging through the notches. Requires BOTH a background image AND its foreground matte (scene.foreground); falls back to poster-hero. Niche — pick only when the scene explicitly wants this landscape-reveal beat.

methods.label: Line Chart Editorial Card (HyperFrames)
methods.whenToUse: Multi-series comparison line chart on a light editorial card (several named series over a shared x-axis, e.g. GDP by country across years). HTML/GSAP — no npm install, lighter than rm-d3-line-trend. Prefer rm-d3-line-trend for a single precise timeseries; prefer this for multi-series editorial comparisons.

wipMethods.label: Three.js Layered Poster Camera Orbit
wipMethods.whenToUse: When there is a layered image asset (poster/PSD-style) and the line narrates spatial/structural analysis of it. Camera orbits in 3D.

wipMethods.label: Framer Motion Comparison Table (Remotion)
wipMethods.whenToUse: Long comparison tables (10+ rows, 3+ columns). Rows fade in staggered, current row highlights.

wipMethods.label: Rive State-Machine Animation (Remotion)
wipMethods.whenToUse: When the narration describes interaction/state-changes and a .riv file exists in assets/. Best for UI demos, character animations, micro-interactions.

wipMethods.label: Fabric.js Canvas Drawing (Remotion)
wipMethods.whenToUse: Free-form diagrams: arrows, circles, callouts drawn programmatically. When no static image fits but you need a shape-based illustration.
